docs.title: #code-graph thread
docs.content:
Thread in #code-graph:
owen: CGRPH-12 is the tree-sitter integration ticket. We need the symbol extractor to handle Python class methods.
penny: yes - grace wrote the initial extractor. she should review the PR.
owen: I'll ping grace. CGRPH-12 has the acceptance criteria in it - symbol resolution needs to handle nested classes too.

docs.title: CGRPH-12: tree-sitter Python symbol extractor
docs.content:
Issue CGRPH-12: Implement tree-sitter Python symbol extractor
Status: In Progress
Assignee: owen
Description: Extract function, class, and method symbols from Python files using tree-sitter. Must handle nested class methods and decorated functions.

docs.title: Code Graph Design
docs.content:
Code Graph Design

The code graph stores symbol-level nodes (Function, Class, Method) extracted from source files. tree-sitter is used to parse Python, TypeScript, and Go. Symbols are linked via CALLS, IMPORTS, and INHERITS edges.

Initial owner: grace (systems team).

expected_edges.note: Thread briefly names grace as the author of the initial symbol extractor, a passing reference
